## Quality workflow

```powershell
py -3 tools/nova_fullstack_studio.py --repo . --open
npm run format:check
npm run lint
npm test
```

## Roadmap

- Fix syntax errors before every other refactor
- Merge duplicate Week5 and Week4 paths on a branch
- Select npm and commit package-lock.json
- Remove duplicate Week1 ZIPs from the repository root
- Regenerate README facts from the repository
- Add a minimal read-only GitHub Actions quality workflow

## Safety

Never commit `.env`, credentials, generated dependencies, caches, or redundant source archives.
